Greek-Entry.English-Entry: B., son and grandson of B.,
: οἱ μὲν γελασῖνον, οἱ δὲ τὴν τῶν νεύρων
causing an abundant flow of milk
at which a kind of milk-frumenty
president of the provincial council of Galatia
offerings made on the occasion of a marriage,
get a wife for the son
it was the fashionable time for weddings
snatcher of everything with curved talons
ὁ πολλὰ εἰδὼς καὶ πανοῦργος: τινὲς δὲ
to be drunk up by Earth
paste, made of brine and small fish
paunch stuffed with mincemeat, sausage, haggis
to be stuffed full, eat gluttonously
with a gulf of a belly
shout so as to make oneself heard
projecting part of the roof, cornice,
to be a neighbour, be adjacent
frippery: the market where they are sold
occasion of laughter, food for laughter
to be the ancestor of the human race
get a beard, come to man"s estate
grow a beard, get a beard
part covered by the beard, chin
day kept in memory of the birthday of the dead
both jaws, the mouth with the teeth
dance resembling the movements of the crane
receiving a portion of distributed lands, colonist
dig in the earth, dig a mine
a spot where a kind of ochre was dug
one who has a share of land, landowner
cast skin, slough of a serpent
taking care of in old age
of one to tend one"s age
battle of the gods and giants
Κύκλωπές τε καὶ ἄγρια φῦλα Γιγάντων
joint in a coat of mail
come into a new state of being
one who knows, a prudent person
juice of the horned poppy, Glaucium corniculatum
opacity of the crystalline lens, cataract
cling to, strive after, long for
medullary tubercles near the pineal gland of the brain
affect with a sensation of sweetness
affect with a sensation of sweetness
to be affected with a sensation of sweetness
those who love staying at home
carve, cut out with a knife
one who is all tongue, speaker
talking till one"s tongue aches, garrulous
one who uses his tongue as his shield and defence,
half a head with the tongue,
mouthpiece of a pipe, in which the reed was inserted
surety for performance of a service,
measure as on a sun-dial, test
fit to judge of, skilled in
gain knowledge of, become acquainted with, discover
that by which a thing is made known, mark, token
one who knows the future, diviner
have pain in the back teeth
that which is fastened by bolts, frame-work
keeping awake by inflammation of the knee
stocks from which olive-trees are struck
skin which forms over boiled milk
folds of skin below the navel
set of written characters, piece of writing
that on which one writes, tablets
to be secretary, hold his office,
teach the spelling of a word
knowing one"s letters, a good scholar
one who occupies himself with literary texts, grammarian, critic
reared by an old woman, coddled
for one"s own use, note down
the penalty named in the indiclment
σαπρὰ γραῦς, οἱ δὲ τὴν παλαιὰν ὄνησιν
those who listen and do not speak
cuirass composed of front- and back-piece
train naked, train in gymnastic exercise
those who have received training as
the youths who attend the school
fond of athletic exercises, skilled in them,
at which naked boys danced and went through gymnastic exercises,
parts not covered by armour, exposed parts,
having the seed with no apparent pericarp,
part of the house reserved for the women,
to be a lover of women,
to be womanish, play the woman,
one that buzzes in a corner,
γουνός, ἕδος, καὶ παιδιά τις παλαιστρική, οἱ δὲ κώπη,
